name: DREAM somatic mutation, lifespan, and disease study
summary: Mixed mechanistic and observational study linking DREAM-associated repressive activity to somatic mutation rates in mouse tissues, mammalian lifespan, Alzheimer disease pathology, and mutation accumulation after DREAM knockout in mouse brain.
model_system: Mouse single-cell tissue atlas, cross-species mammalian transcriptomics, human Alzheimer disease data, and mouse DREAM knockout mutation profiling
